creator: zeising@daemonic.se
text:
Hi!
I just tested your patch, it works.  I have one question though, is the
startup script really necessary?  I would assume that the user would
copy the config files he wants?
Apart from that, good job!
Also, should I take maintanership, as we said before, or do you want
maintanership?
Regards!
-- 
Niclas
